== Notes for [[Item:Q101845|Q101845]] ==

Son of http://www.geni.com/people/David-de-l-Estoile/6000000000348876486 ?
--------------------
https://www.genealogieonline.nl/en/stamboom-haverbus/kwartierstaat.php?id=I15824668


https://www.heilesen.dk/gen/getperson.php?personID=I1893&tree=tree1

My 14th great grandfather.

Settled in Germany and translated his name to German.

To see the ultimate ancestors, check Aharon Ha Cohen.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD9ABF3E1EFBBFA9822EF79916CA16F
geni:6000000000348802949

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
